race_meta.race_name: Midnite A Next Generation Betting App Handicap

ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Model placed golspie at position 2 (25.0% probability) vs top pick Clansman (30.0%). Underestimated winning horse by ~5.0 percentage points.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Clansman > Golspie, but actual result was Golspie > Clansman. Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Winner Golspie had well-aligned model/market values (divergence 0.0%). Market pricing efficient for this outcome.
